theme_and_archetype.mood: Tuscan countryside, stone, forest, olive trees, silence, restoration, heritage, slow living.

primary_heading.usage: Page titles, KPI values, section headers

secondary_body.usage: Body text, tables, form inputs, buttons, calendar events

labels_overlines.usage: Category labels, table headers, small metadata

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. The layout should feel like an editorial magazine, not a cramped IT dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Desktop: p-8 to p-12. Mobile: p-4 to p-6.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Use gap-6 or gap-8. Mix spans to create visual tension.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Desktop: Fixed sidebar with subtle right border. Mobile: Bottom tab bar with lucide-react icons.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Flat beige (#E7DFD1) cards. No drop shadows. 1px border (#B8AC98 with 30% opacity).

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#B8AC98] text-[#1F211B] rounded-md hover:bg-[#E7DFD1]

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#B8AC98] border-b border-[#B8AC98]/30 pb-3

badges_tags.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-[#B8AC98]/30 text-[#1F211B]

component_styling.border_radius: Universal 6px to 8px (rounded-md to rounded-lg). Avoid full rounded corners except for avatars or badges.

hero_auth.description: Stone villa with olive trees. Use for auth screen background.

empty_state_experiences.description: Slow living interior setup. Excellent placeholder for empty states.

dashboard_accent.description: Tuscan countryside landscape. Use as a subtle decorative header image.

motion_and_interactions.general: Minimal, non-distracting. Focus on tactile feedback.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Slight background darkening. No heavy transforms or bounce.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text on #E7DFD1 meets APCA standard. Use #1F211B for primary text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-dashboard').

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic blue SaaS colors anywhere (including Shadcn defaults). Configure tailwind.config.js immediately with the provided hex codes.
Enforce 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings/KPIs and 'Manrope' for body.
Implement 'data-testid' attributes on all buttons, links, inputs, and major sections.
Construct the UI entirely using React (.js/jsx). Do not use .tsx files.
Strip all box-shadows from Shadcn components. Use flat colors and borders instead for a grounded, earthy look.
Calendar implementation must color-code blocks accurately based on the 'calendar_status' palette.
Ensure mobile PWA readiness: touch-friendly targets, bottom navigation, and no horizontal scroll overflow.
